rationale: Small codebase (2 main Python files, no modules). Most tasks are single-file edits in the harness editable section. Unified strategy (symbol discovery + direct implementation) is appropriate.

caching.notes: Small project — memories fit easily in cache. Constitution and CLAUDE.md are loaded every session.

use_opus_for: security review of API key handling

expected_savings.code_exploration: 70-80% (2 files, each ~250 lines — reading full files is still cheap, but symbol-first is faster)

notes: This is a very small project. The main cost driver will be long benchmark run.log files and trajectory.json files from jobs/.
Avoid reading trajectory.json files unless diagnosing a specific failure — they can be large.
Use Grep to search run.log for specific task names rather than reading the full log.
The FIXED ADAPTER section of agent.py is irrelevant to most edits — use symbol-first to skip it.
